$comment: Sensor-to-zone mapping. This file IS the proposal's 'modular sensor placement' novelty made concrete (FR-02/FR-03) and the single source of truth for sensor->zone (the engine builds the reverse index). Add/remove/move sensors and remap zones here with no code change. Each sensor publishes bsw/sensor/{id}; the fusion engine routes it to 'zone'. Ultrasonic sensors carry fire_group (ADR-0007) to avoid acoustic cross-talk: group 0 = the four center/mid sensors, group 1 = the four corner sensors; the two groups fire alternately so adjacent cones never ping together, giving ~master/2 (~5 Hz) per sensor.

sensors.$comment: Phase-2 camera classifier on the deadliest zone. Publishes bsw/detection/cam_right with object_class; the fusion engine maps cam_right -> RIGHT via this file, exactly like any other sensor (no zone baked into firmware).
